subject: refactor(ui): align BurgerMenu with glow-props disclosure pattern spec
body:
Apply burger menu refinements from shared standards:

- Disclosure pattern: Update file header to document WAI-ARIA disclosure
  pattern choice (not role="menu") and why
- Separator lines: Add separator between item groups (help / PWA / auth)
  using StyleSheet.hairlineWidth divider
- Destructive styling: "Sign out" renders in error color (red)
- External indicators: User Guide and Testing Guide show ↗ suffix and
  announce "opens externally" to screen readers
- Timer: 100ms → 150ms to match Modal fade animation settle time
- Error handling: Menu action errors now log to debug pill instead of
  being swallowed silently
- Accessibility: label "Open menu" → "Menu" per spec
- Label flex: menuLabel gets flex:1 to prevent external indicator overflow

Tags: ui, accessibility, burger-menu, glow-props
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch
